llm.period: third fiscal quarter of 2002 and the 2002 fiscal year
llm.reasoning: The primary mechanism involves the premature recognition of full gains on real estate sales, which is a direct violation of revenue recognition principles and falls under REVENUE_TIMING.
llm.specific_mechanism: Ness approved the immediate recognition of the full gain on several real estate sales, even though GAAP criteria for full gain recognition, such as buyers making substantial initial down payments, had not been met, which allowed Metropolitan to report a net profit instead of a net loss for the third fiscal quarter of 2002 and the 2002 fiscal year.
